title: rondeletia ligulata
intro: Rondeletia ligulata, also known as the Pink Button Flower, is a tropical flowering plant native to the West Indies and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and treat wounds, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rondeletia ligulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rondeletia ligulata is often made into a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
